note: Explorer TX summary fix: precision + self-send capsule classification. (1) New adaptive formatter fSx() returns 4 decimals when exact, escalates to 8 decimals when toFixed(4) would silently round (449.99999737 was displaying as 450.0000; 0.00000263 fee was displaying as 0.0000). (2) Self-send capsule reclassification: when every OUT_TRANSFER routes back to the source address and a capsule is present, the smallest such output is labeled 'capsule self-send' instead of being lumped into 'change returned'. Confirmed-tx render (renderIndexedTx) + mempool render (renderMempoolTx) both upgraded. Verified against on-chain TX d68678b5... (Kalgoorlie Phase 1 capsule, 0.01 SOST self-send + 449.98999737 change + 263 sat fee). NO consensus / RPC / node / miner / wallet / wire-format change. NO new endpoints. Pure JS display layer in sost-explorer.html.
